name: Windows Driver Core
description: Low-risk validation profile for Windows driver level 14 core callbacks and endpoint ingestion.

tests.name: File Callback Temp Create Modify Delete
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command '$d=Join-Path $env:TEMP ("tamandua-driver-bench-" + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString("N")); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d -Force | Out-Null; $p=Join-Path $d "sample.txt"; New-Item -ItemType File -Path $p -Force | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Set-Content -Path $p -Value "tamandua"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Add-Content -Path $p -Value "driver"; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Remove-Item -Path $p -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Remove-Item -Path $d -Force -Recurse'

tests.name: Registry Callback HKLM Safe Key
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /c "reg add HKLM\Software\TamanduaBench /v Smoke /t REG_SZ /d 1 /f && reg delete HKLM\Software\TamanduaBench /f"

tests.name: Image Load Callback Basic
tests.fallback_command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command 'Start-Process -FilePath "$env:WINDIR\System32\notepad.exe" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Get-Process notepad -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force'
